features: Low to No Maintenance Plants: If you love plants and flowers, but you can't maintain them due to your busy life, our artificial lavender are the answer to your problem. No need to worry about watering your lavender flowers artificial anymore

Add A Refreshing Touch To Any Space: After a long day looking at a screen, a quick glance at your cute artificial flowers can change your mood in a minute. Office desk plant is a must-have room decor for women

Are These Faux Plants Real? The CADNLY artificial lavender flowers are so realistic they could easily pass for real flowers. Our decorative flower decor measures 6-inch width and 8.7-inch height approx. Size of pot is 3.1-inch x 3.1-inch

Tie The Whole Room Together: Our purple lavender decor can also make a great addition to your home decoration. Small faux lavender plant will add a tasteful touch for table decorations of your living room and dining room

Order Your Small Fake Plants Decor: Our customers' satisfaction is our first and foremost priority. We offer you a full refund of your money in case you are not 100% satisfied with your artificial lavender plants in grey pots 2-pack
